title: Yaar Mera Titliaan Warga
desc: A couple, bored after six years of marriage, creates fake Facebook accounts to spice things up. Surprisingly, they befriend each other unknowingly.

title: Bajre Da Sitta
desc: A talented young woman with a stunning voice faces societal restrictions and a controlling husband, who threatens to send her back home if she dares to sing.

title: Bina Band Chal England
desc: A man's lie about his family's job creates comedic chaos between families.

title: Hoshiar Singh
desc: Denied education, Hoshiar Singh fights the system to become a teacher, pioneering an innovative approach to teaching and life.

title: Nikka Zaildar
desc: Nikka, a rich college student, loves Manraj, but a mix-up gets him engaged to her sister. Comedy and confusion follow before Nikka and Manraj unite in love.

title: Dakuaan Da Munda
desc: A young promising Kabaddi player gets addicted to drugs, wreaking his career. However, he gradually fights his addiction and begins a new life, inspiring the youth around him.

title: Haye Bibiye Kithe Fas Gaye
desc: Dheera moves to the UK for a fresh start but gets more than he bargained for-a ghost family! Hilarity ensues as he learns to coexist with his spooky, but lovable, supernatural roommates.

title: Chor Dil
desc: A man gets a gangster's heart. After his transplant, he feels a strange pull toward crime. This is a wild, funny story set in the Punjabi world.

title: Speaker Kharke
desc: A compilation of popular songs sung and composed by famous artists, played back-to-back for continuous entertainment.

title: Main Te Bapu
desc: Laali's life revolves around his widowed father and girlfriend Mahi. Having to choose between them he hatches the idea of getting his father married and things start to get interesting.

title: Chhalle Mundiyaan
desc: When two former lovers reunite after years, they both believe the other is married. This misunderstanding puts their love to the test, challenging their emotions and their future together.

title: Sufna
desc: Jeet and Teg, a labourer working in the fields, fall in love with each other. However, they face several difficulties to maintain their relationship.
